'''barowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pockiness|pockiness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-r-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pockiness|pockiness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| barowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæreweth|bæreweth]] || [[word:bærewej|bærewej]] || [[word:bærewesh|bærewesh]] || [[word:bærewe|bærewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:barorowoth|barorowoth]] || [[word:barorowoj|barorowoj]] || [[word:barorowosh|barorowosh]] || [[word:barorowo|barorowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:barowoth|barowoth]] || [[word:barowoj|barowoj]] || [[word:barowosh|barowosh]] || [[word:barowo|barowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:barofwoth|barofwoth]] || [[word:barofwoj|barofwoj]] || [[word:barofwosh|barofwosh]] || [[word:barofwof|barofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:barowotho|barowotho]] || [[word:barowojo|barowojo]] || [[word:barowosho|barowosho]] || [[word:barowoko|barowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:barowoth|barowoth]] || [[word:barowoj|barowoj]] || [[word:barowosh|barowosh]] || [[word:barowo|barowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:barowothol|barowothol]] || [[word:barowojol|barowojol]] || [[word:barowoshol|barowoshol]] || [[word:barowokol|barowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:barowothotho|barowothotho]] || [[word:barowojojo|barowojojo]] || [[word:barowoshosho|barowoshosho]] || [[word:barowoko|barowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:barowothon|barowothon]] || [[word:barowojon|barowojon]] || [[word:barowoshon|barowoshon]] || [[word:barowokon|barowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:barowothoro|barowothoro]] || [[word:barowojoro|barowojoro]] || [[word:barowoshoro|barowoshoro]] || [[word:barowokoro|barowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
